name: Home Assistant Bridge
description: Full bidirectional bridge between Super Productivity and Home Assistant. Control your smart home from SP (focus lighting, scenes, devices), view HA sensor data in the side panel, and push instant task updates to HA automations.
author: jloops412

haToken.title: Long-Lived Access Token
haToken.description: Create at: HA Profile > Long-Lived Access Tokens

webhookId.title: Webhook ID (optional)
webhookId.description: For instant updates. Find in HA logs after loading SP integration.

focusScene.title: Focus Scene (optional)
focusScene.description: HA scene to activate when tracking starts (e.g., scene.focus_mode)

relaxScene.title: Relax Scene (optional)
relaxScene.description: HA scene to activate when tracking stops (e.g., scene.relax)

showSensors.title: Sensors to display (comma-separated)
showSensors.description: HA entity IDs to show in side panel (e.g., sensor.temperature,sensor.humidity)
